hypothesis: When coupled with the CALPHAD/JMA simulator and prompt-tuned via DSPy's LabeledFewShot strategy, a ReAct-based GPT-4o agent will, on average across the four Nb–O synthesis tasks, achieve equal or higher success rates and visit fewer states than the discretized-state A* algorithm because the LLM can leverage learned heuristics and tool access to navigate the continuous thermokinetic search space more efficiently.
